summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP system UI refactoring (sidebar → top-nav layout). All core functionality working correctly with real MongoDB Atlas data.

minor.issue: Returns 403 without anno parameter - expected behavior for protected endpoint

ui_bugs.issue: Chat toggle button (🤖) overlaps with mobile menu button on small screens, causing click interception

seed_data_creation: None - using real MongoDB Atlas data (316 suppliers, 2 employees, 1051 corrispettivi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top-nav layout refactoring complete and working. All navigation dropdowns functional. Secondary tabs appear contextually on relevant pages (/dipendenti shows Anagrafica, Cedolini, Presenze, TFR). Mobile bottom nav hidden on desktop, visible on mobile. Backend connected to MongoDB Atlas with real data.

top_navigation.details: Primary nav bar visible with brand 'Ceraldi ERP', all dropdown menus working (Fatture, Banca, Fisco, HR, Altro)

secondary_tabs.details: Context-sensitive tabs appear on relevant pages (e.g., /dipendenti shows Anagrafica, Cedolini, Presenze, TFR)

anno_selector.details: 2026 year selector visible in top nav right section

dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with real data - shows payments, scadenze, bilancio, backend connected status

fornitori_page.details: Displays 316 suppliers correctly with search/filter and supplier cards

dipendenti_page.details: Shows 2 employees (Mario Rossi, Giulia Bianchi) with HR dashboard and quick actions

mobile_navigation.details: Mobile bottom nav hidden on desktop, visible on mobile viewport with Home/Fatture/Banca/HR/Menu

dropdown_menus.details: All dropdown menus (Fatture, Banca, Fisco, HR, Altro) open on hover and navigate correctly
